_comment: WC2026 Round of 32, 2026-07-02. KNOCKOUT: no draw -- level after 90' -> extra time -> penalties, so the deliverable is who ADVANCES. Routes: Spain WON Group H (0-0 Cape Verde, 4-0 Saudi Arabia, 1-0 Uruguay; 7 pts, GF 5 GA 0, rating 94) -- a tournament-favourite-tier side, defensively AIRTIGHT (zero conceded, three clean sheets). KEY texture: Spain can be BLUNT vs a deep low block (the 0-0 vs Cape Verde) but ROUTS when the game opens (4-0 Saudi). Austria finished 2nd in Group J (3-1 Jordan, 0-2 Argentina, 3-3 Algeria; 4 pts, GF 6 GA 6, GD 0, rating 79) -- ATTACKING (6 goals) but VERY LEAKY (shipped 3 to Algeria, GA 6); an open side, NOT a Cape-Verde-style low block. Class gap ~15 (94 vs 79) -> Spain a heavy favourite. Crucially, Austria's openness plays INTO Spain's rout profile: a leaky, attacking underdog gives Spain the space it lacked vs Cape Verde -> a favourite+goals tie with real rout potential (the 'don't fade the elite favourite; Spain routs when the game opens' lesson from Spain 4-0). Austria can nick one (they score), but Spain's elite defence caps that. Lower shootout risk than the round's tight ties. Home = Spain (nominal; neutral venue). Cards not modelled (referee TBD).

meta.stakes: Single-elimination: level after 90' -> extra time -> penalties. Spain a heavy favourite (won Group H, rating 94, zero conceded) vs an attacking-but-very-leaky Austria (2nd in Group J, rating 79). Austria's openness suits Spain's rout profile -> a favourite+goals tie with rout potential, low shootout risk.

home.name: Spain
notes: Tournament-tier (rating 94); AIRTIGHT (GA 0, three clean sheets). Blunt vs a deep block (0-0 Cape Verde) but ROUTS an open side (4-0 Saudi). vs a leaky, attacking Austria -> the game opens for Spain. attack folded into base.
Elite defence -> Austria's goals capped. defense folded into base.
Heavy favourite; Austria's openness suits Spain's rout profile.

away.name: Austria
notes: Attacking (6 goals: 3-1 Jordan, 3-3 Algeria) -> can nick one, not a low block. attack folded into base_away.
VERY leaky (shipped 3 to Algeria, GA 6, GD 0) -> gives Spain space to rout. defense folded into base_away.
Clear underdog; open game -> favourite+goals with rout potential, low ET/penalty risk.

_recal: First pass landed at Spain 69.7 / Draw 19.0 / Austria 11.3 vs market de-vig 68.2 / 19.9 / 11.9 -- max divergence 1.5 pts, ALIGNED on the first attempt (HIGH confidence), no lift/trim needed. Applied the Spain lesson: do NOT fade the elite favourite -- Austria's openness feeds Spain's rout profile.
